semantic_deltas.decision: Standard, Deep, and CI validation require test-only composition of the two accepted exact-group production sides with byte-identical prefix checks.
semantic_deltas.reason: Requester and responder evidence should compose without silently expanding either production surface or network policy.
does_not_authorize: other groups, interfaces, retries, or background work

semantic_deltas.decision: Standard, Deep, and CI validation require the exact-group explicit-loopback responder checker after the multicast observation and requester-conformance gates.
semantic_deltas.reason: Observed membership can authorize only one capability-gated responder composition that reuses the existing finite parser, envelope, cancellation, deadline, and cleanup loop.
preserves: one explicit loopback interface and exact group
does_not_authorize: other groups, IPv6, or non-loopback interfaces

semantic_deltas.decision: Standard, Deep, and CI validation require test-only exact-group multicast requester conformance after the LSLC-004C observation gate.
semantic_deltas.reason: The existing explicit-destination requester must remain byte-unchanged while composing with the observed group under one bounded synthetic query/response and cleanup.
preserves: finite deadline and cancellation owner behavior
does_not_authorize: other groups, address families, or non-loopback interfaces

semantic_deltas.decision: Standard, Deep, and CI validation require the public-safe single-group IPv4 multicast observation checker after public-boundary validation.
semantic_deltas.reason: Membership, explicit interface use, finite directions, cleanup, counts, timing ceilings, platform limits, hashes, and nonclaims must remain synchronized without portable multicast execution.
does_not_authorize: other groups, IPv6, or interface policy

semantic_deltas.decision: Retain accepted LSLC-003Z as a historical gate but remove its fixed-128 source assertion from current profiles and the observation dependency path; LSLC-004B preserves its owner case while asserting the authorized 129/130 boundary.
semantic_deltas.reason: The older checker intentionally rejects any change to MAX_STRING_BYTES 128 and cannot validate the separately observed exact-129 extension.
does_not_authorize: additional channels, records, or length forms
ambient activation, devices, dependencies, commands, or authority

semantic_deltas.decision: Standard, Deep, and CI validation require the focused exact-129 String runtime checker after accepted observations and activation closure.
semantic_deltas.reason: The newly authorized boundary must remain composed with exact 130-byte rejection, prior empty/nonempty behavior, cleanup, and nonclaims.
preserves: one channel and one caller record
does_not_authorize: additional channels, records, or length forms
ambient activation, devices, dependencies, commands, or authority

semantic_deltas.decision: Standard, Deep, and CI validation require the public-safe exact-129-byte String observation checker after public-boundary, LSLC-003Y evidence, and LSLC-003Z runtime gates.
semantic_deltas.reason: The next byte boundary must remain synchronized with two pinned attempt hashes, exact length-form-one framing, private drift exclusion, and nonclaims without portable oracle execution or runtime widening.
does_not_authorize: other String dimensions or length forms

semantic_deltas.decision: Retain the accepted LSLC-003T and LSLC-003X gates as historical records but remove their fixed-127 source assertions from current profiles and from the LSLC-003Y observation dependency path; LSLC-003Z directly preserves their runtime cases in the owner suite and focused checker while asserting the authorized 128/129 boundary.
semantic_deltas.reason: Both older checkers intentionally reject any change to MAX_STRING_BYTES 127, so they cannot validate the separately observed and authorized exact-128 extension; LSLC-003Y is observation-only and does not require current runtime execution.
preserves: all LSLC-003T and LSLC-003X Rust owner cases
finite deadline, cancellation, damaged framing, and cleanup
does_not_authorize: additional channels, records, or length forms
ambient activation, devices, dependencies, commands, or authority

preserves: one channel and one caller record
does_not_authorize: additional channels, records, or length forms
ambient activation, devices, dependencies, commands, or authority

semantic_deltas.reason: The next byte boundary must remain synchronized with two pinned attempt hashes, exact length-form-one framing, private drift exclusion, and nonclaims without portable oracle execution or runtime widening.

semantic_deltas.decision: Remove LSLC-003V's byte-identical LSLC-003U production-prefix assertion from current execution profiles while retaining its gate record and its two nonempty cases in the owner test suite; LSLC-003X directly depends on LSLC-003T, LSLC-003U, and LSLC-003W.
semantic_deltas.reason: An authorized empty-value production extension necessarily changes the old prefix, so executing that historical no-production-change assertion would reject the new accepted claim rather than preserve nonempty conformance.
preserves: the LSLC-003V mixed-width and exact-127-byte Rust tests
does_not_authorize: additional channels, records, lengths, or length forms
ambient activation, devices, dependencies, commands, or authority

does_not_authorize: additional channels, records, or length forms

preserves: LSLC-003T production bytes and public API
all prior gates and evidence boundaries

semantic_deltas.decision: Standard, Deep, and CI validation require the public-safe LSLC-003U boundary observation checker after its public-boundary and LSLC-003Q evidence dependencies.

semantic_deltas.decision: Add a distinct selected-but-run-disabled StringSample module capability and descriptor to closed lock revision 14.
semantic_deltas.reason: A later bounded String runtime must consume module-nominal authority rather than reuse numeric or handshake-only admission.
preserves: all prior module identities and dependencies

semantic_deltas.decision: Standard, Deep, and CI validation require the public-safe LSLC-003Q String observation checker after the public-boundary gate.
semantic_deltas.reason: The new observation must stay synchronized with its exact framing dimensions, private hashes, negative classifications, and nonclaims without executing the private oracle in portable validation.

semantic_deltas.decision: Standard, Deep, and CI validation require the LSLC-003P focused runtime gate after its LSLC-003O evidence dependency.
semantic_deltas.reason: The new public runtime breadth must remain exactly synchronized with its closed observed dimensions and limitations.

semantic_deltas.decision: Standard, Deep, and CI validation now require the public-safe LSLC-003O observation checker after the public-boundary gate.
semantic_deltas.reason: The new accepted candidate evidence must remain synchronized with exact bounds, hashes, limitations, and documentation routes without treating private oracle execution as a portable current gate.
preserves: all prior current gates and profiles

semantic_deltas.decision: Hash-pinned immutable historical receipts remain subject to every path, binary, UTF-8, private-content, credential, build-artifact, and whitespace boundary, but are exempt from the mutable-text terminal-newline rule when and only when their exact current bytes equal the committed HEAD bytes.
semantic_deltas.reason: The accepted LSLC-003M receipt predates its own post-acceptance aggregate scan and has no terminal newline; modifying accepted evidence would violate the stronger immutability authority.
preserves: terminal-newline enforcement for current and mutable files
